subject: english
topic_title: Stress in Seven-Syllable and Compound Words
learning_objectives: Explain stress as a feature of speech
Identify stressed syllables in seven-syllable words
Identify stressed syllables in compound words

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content:
Stress is an important feature of speech.
It gives extra force to a word or syllable when saying it.

sections.heading: Seven-Syllable Words
sections.content:
In-de-fen-si-BIL-i-ty
In-di-spen-sa-BIL-i-ty
In-di-vis-i-BIL-i-ty
Im-pen-e-tra-BIL-i-ty
Im-per-me-a-BIL-i-ty
In-ad-miss-i-BIL-i-ty
In-a-ccess-i-BIL-i-ty

sections.heading: Compound Words
sections.content:
absent-MINDed
action-PACKED
back-DOOR
blue-CHIP
bottle-FEED
FLY-by

sections.heading: Evaluation Examples
sections.content:
Identify the stressed syllable in:
incontestability
individualism
individualistic
intellectualism
irrefutability
passer-by
in-laws
top-class
vice-president
wide-eyed
